causal_chain: raindrop impacts shallow water -> water rises -> rings expand
source_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a single raindrop hitting a shallow puddle, causing a crown splash to rise and circular ripples to expand outward across the water.
counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a shallow puddle with a calm, undisturbed water surface. No raindrop is present.
control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a shallow puddle with gentle wind-made surface texture but no falling droplet or crown splash.
notes: Strong canonical fluid-impact row.

causal_chain: pebble enters still water -> displacement -> circular wavefront
source_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a small pebble dropping into a still pond, causing circular ripples to spread outward across the water.
counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a still pond with a calm, undisturbed surface. No pebble is present.
control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a still pond where gentle background ripples move across the surface with no impact point.
notes: Use still water constraint to reduce ambiguity.

causal_chain: hailstone strikes calm water -> impact depression -> rings spread
source_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a tiny hailstone landing on calm water, causing concentric rings to spread across the surface after impact.
counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of calm water with a smooth undisturbed surface. No hailstone is present.
control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of calm water with faint natural surface motion and no visible impact point.
notes: Good variant of stone/raindrop with small visible source.

causal_footprint: colored plume spreads through clear water

source_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a blue ink droplet falling into a clear glass of water, causing a blue plume to bloom and spread downward through the water.
counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a clear glass of water with transparent, still water. No ink droplet is present.
control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a clear glass of water tinted pale blue evenly, with no falling droplet or blooming plume.
notes: Very visible footprint, but target may blend with footprint.

causal_footprint: brown turbulence and bubbles spread on coffee surface
causal_chain: sugar cube drops into coffee -> splash/turbulence -> bubbles spread
source_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a white sugar cube dropping into a cup of dark coffee, causing brown turbulence and small bubbles to spread across the surface.
counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of a cup of dark coffee with a smooth, still surface. No sugar cube is present.
control_prompt: A realistic close-up video of dark coffee being gently stirred by a spoon, causing surface turbulence with the spoon visible.

source_prompt: A realistic slow-motion video of a small water balloon hitting a clean floor, causing water to splash outward in all directions.

control_prompt: A realistic video of water already spilled on a clean floor with no bursting balloon.

counterfactual_prompt: A realistic close-up video of smooth wet beach sand with an untouched surface. No shoe is present.
